title: Women in Public Affairs Meetup
description: An informal gathering for women working in communications and policy. Share experiences, swap ideas, and connect over drinks in a relaxed setting.

title: Strategic Storytelling Workshop
description: A half-day workshop on building clear narratives and messages for campaigns and policy work. Open to all levels. Bring your current projects and we'll work through them together.

title: Comms Collective Quarterly
description: Our quarterly get-together: no agenda, no slides—just good conversation with fellow communicators. New faces always welcome.
